summary: Comprehensive backend testing of Proof Fabric Protocol (PFP) API completed. All 19 tests passed covering FEA generation, idempotency, replay protection, key registry persistence, and verification endpoints.
passed_tests: Config endpoint returns test API key (/api/config)
FEA generation requires API key (401 without X-API-Key)
FEA generation validates required fields (422 for missing fields)
Idempotency: same idempotency_key + same payload returns same FEA (200)
Idempotency conflict: same idempotency_key + different payload returns 409
Replay protection: different idempotency_key + same (transaction_id, timestamp) + same payload returns existing FEA (200)
Replay attack: different idempotency_key + same (transaction_id, timestamp) + different payload returns 409 with 'Transaction replay detected with conflicting data'
Key registry persistence verified (keys persist across requests)
Public verification returns 404 for non-existent FEA
Edge case: invalid currency (>3 chars) rejected (422)
seed_data_creation: 8 FEAs created during testing with TEST_ prefix in idempotency_key and transaction_id
context_for_next_testing_agent: All PFP API features working correctly. Key registry has 1 active key (key_0c6c7071b3086f1a). Compound unique index on (transaction_id, timestamp) is active for replay protection. FEAs have both canonical_payload_hash (for idempotency) and transaction_payload_hash (for replay protection). Test data uses TEST_ prefix.

replay_protection.error_message: Transaction replay detected with conflicting data
